Main Page | Class Hierarchy | Data Structures | File List | Data Fields

FreeFrame SDK Data Structures

Here are the data structures with brief descriptions:
CFFPluginInfoCFFPluginInfo manages static information concerning a plugin name, version, and description
CFFPluginManagerCFFPluginManager manages information concerning a plugin inputs, parameters, and capabilities
CFreeFramePluginCFreeFramePlugin is the base class for all FreeFrame plugins developed with the FreeFrame SDK
